title: Introduction to Django and MVT Architecture
description: Understand what Django is and how the Model-View-Template pattern works.
content:
Django is a high-level Python web framework that promotes rapid development and clean design.

MVT Architecture:
- Model: Handles data and database
- View: Handles business logic and HTTP requests
- Template: Handles presentation (HTML)

Django is 'batteries-included' with built-in admin, authentication, ORM, forms, and security features.

quizzes.question: What does MVT stand for in Django?
Django is written in which programming language?

title: Setting Up Django Project and Virtual Environment
description: Install Django and create your first project properly using virtual environment.
content:
Best practice commands:
python -m venv venv
venv\Scripts\activate     # On Windows
pip install django
django-admin startproject myproject .
python manage.py runserver

quizzes.question: What command creates a new Django project?

title: Creating Django Apps and Understanding Project Structure
description: Learn the difference between project and app, and explore important files.
content:
python manage.py startapp blog

Key files:
- settings.py (project configuration)
- urls.py (routing)
- views.py (logic)
- models.py (database)
- admin.py (admin panel)

quizzes.question: Which command is used to create a new Django app?

title: URLs and Routing
description: Connect URLs to views using path and converters.
content:
In urls.py:
from django.urls import path
from . import views

urlpatterns = [
    path('', views.home, name='home'),
    path('post/<int:pk>/', views.post_detail, name='post_detail')
]

quizzes.question: What parameter is used to give a name to a URL pattern?

title: Function-Based Views (FBVs)
description: Write simple and clear views using functions.

quizzes.question: What does a Django view function usually return?

title: Templates and Django Template Language (DTL)
description: Create dynamic HTML pages using Django templates.

quizzes.question: Which template tag is used for inheritance?

title: Databases in Django: SQL vs NoSQL Overview
description: Understand the difference between SQL and NoSQL databases in Django.
content:
Django ORM works best with SQL databases (PostgreSQL is recommended for production).
For MongoDB, use the official django-mongodb-backend.
Database configuration is done in settings.py under DATABASES.

quizzes.question: Which database is most recommended for Django production projects?

title: Models and Database Basics
description: Define your data structure using Django models.
content:
from django.db import models

class Post(models.Model):
    title = models.CharField(max_length=200)
    content = models.TextField()
    created_at = models.DateTimeField(auto_now_add=True)

    def __str__(self):
        return self.title

quizzes.question: What is the base class for all Django models?

title: Migrations and Django ORM Queries
description: Apply database changes and query data using Django ORM.
content:
Commands:
python manage.py makemigrations
python manage.py migrate

Common queries:
Post.objects.all()
Post.objects.filter(title__contains='django')
Post.objects.get(id=1)

quizzes.question: Which command actually applies changes to the database?

title: Working with SQL Databases (PostgreSQL & MySQL)
description: Configure Django with relational databases like PostgreSQL and MySQL.

quizzes.question: What is the ENGINE string for PostgreSQL?

title: Django Admin Panel Customization
description: Use and customize the powerful built-in admin interface.
content:
In admin.py:
from django.contrib import admin
from .models import Post

@admin.register(Post)
class PostAdmin(admin.ModelAdmin):
    list_display = ['title', 'created_at']
    search_fields = ['title']

quizzes.question: How do you register a model in Django admin?

title: Forms and ModelForms
description: Handle user input with validation using Django forms.

quizzes.question: Which class is used to create a form based on a model?

title: Class-Based Views (CBVs) and Generic Views
description: Use reusable class-based views for common operations.
content:
from django.views.generic import ListView

class PostListView(ListView):
    model = Post
    template_name = 'blog/post_list.html'

quizzes.question: Which generic view displays a list of objects?

title: Static and Media Files Management
description: Handle CSS, JavaScript, images, and user-uploaded files.
content:
STATIC_URL = '/static/'
MEDIA_URL = '/media/'

In template: {% load static %}
<link rel="stylesheet" href="{% static 'css/style.css' %}">

quizzes.question: Which setting is used for user-uploaded files?

title: User Authentication and Authorization
description: Use Django's built-in system for login, logout, and permissions.

quizzes.question: Which decorator is used to allow only logged-in users?

title: Secure Password Hashing with bcrypt in Django
description: Learn how to securely store passwords using bcrypt.
content:
Install: pip install django[bcrypt]

In settings.py:
PASSWORD_HASHERS = [
    'django.contrib.auth.hashers.BCryptSHA256PasswordHasher',
    'django.contrib.auth.hashers.PBKDF2PasswordHasher',
    ...
]

Use: user.set_password('newpassword')

BCryptSHA256PasswordHasher is recommended as it avoids the 72-character limit.

quizzes.question: What must be installed to enable bcrypt hashing in Django?
Which hasher should be placed first to use bcrypt?
How do you securely set a user's password?

title: Custom User Model
description: Create your own user model with additional fields.
content:
from django.contrib.auth.models import AbstractUser

class CustomUser(AbstractUser):
    phone = models.CharField(max_length=15)

In settings.py:
AUTH_USER_MODEL = 'accounts.CustomUser'

quizzes.question: When is it recommended to create a Custom User Model?
options: Only when you need extra fields
quizzes.correct_answer: Only when you need extra fields

title: Model Relationships
description: Connect models using ForeignKey, ManyToManyField, and OneToOneField.

quizzes.question: What does on_delete=models.CASCADE do?

title: Advanced ORM Queries
description: Write complex and optimized database queries.
content:
Post.objects.filter(published=True).order_by('-created_at')
Post.objects.annotate(comment_count=Count('comment'))

quizzes.question: Which method adds calculated fields to queryset results?

title: MongoDB with Django (Official Backend)
description: Integrate MongoDB using the official Django MongoDB backend.
content:
pip install django-mongodb-backend

In settings.py use ENGINE: 'django_mongodb_backend'

quizzes.question: What is the recommended package for using MongoDB with Django in 2026?

title: Testing in Django
description: Write tests to ensure your application works correctly.

quizzes.question: Which base class is commonly used for testing models?

title: Deployment Preparation
description: Prepare your Django project for production environment.
content:
Set DEBUG = False
Use environment variables for SECRET_KEY
Run: python manage.py collectstatic
Use Gunicorn + Nginx or deployment platforms.

quizzes.question: What should DEBUG be set to in production?

title: Introduction to Django REST Framework (Building APIs)
description: Build modern REST APIs using Django REST Framework.
content:
pip install djangorestframework

Use Serializers and ViewSets to create clean APIs that work with both SQL and MongoDB.

quizzes.question: What is the main purpose of Django REST Framework?
